jobs.file: phdjd001 - Advisory - Delivery Leader, AI Adoption & Change Management.txt
jobs.title: Delivery Leader, AI Adoption & Change Management
jobs.body:
Join phData, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack. We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India. We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust. Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment. We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.

6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran, dbt, Atlation, and AWS Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)
Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the US, India, and LATAM

Enterprise AI is moving fast. Enterprise adoption isn't. phData is building the practice that closes that gap, and we need the practitioners to drive it.

We're seeking a Delivery Leader, with a focus on AI Adoption & Change Management to lead the hands-on delivery of enterprise-wide adoption programs for agentic AI, LLM-powered solutions, foundational data platforms, and modern analytics across our customer organizations. This is a delivery-focused client leader role sitting at the intersection of execution, client trust, and practice growth — with direct impact on customer satisfaction, measurable business outcomes, and our market positioning as we build and evolve intelligence platforms for customers.

If you have deep roots in AI, data, or analytics-driven transformation, this is the role for you.

Core Responsibilities

Change Management & Adoption Strategy
- Design and execute structured change and adoption plans with clear workstreams, milestones, and tactics that maximize adoption of data platforms, analytics tools, and AI-powered workflows
- Translate technical platform and AI model impacts into role-based change tactics, journey maps, and "what changes for me" narratives
- Define, track, and report on adoption and behavior change metrics — including scorecards and dashboards for client stakeholders
- Design and facilitate training, enablement, and AI upskilling experiences (data literacy, AI literacy, prompt engineering, responsible AI) tailored to different personas with measurable outcomes

Client Leadership & Account Growth
- Serve as a trusted advisor to day-to-day client sponsors and senior stakeholders — owning relationships, aligning on delivery roadmaps, and surfacing expansion opportunities
- Partner with executive sponsors, data and analytics leaders, product and delivery teams, and business end users to ensure seamless execution and measurable outcomes
- Build cross-practice relationships (Data Engineering, Analytics, AI/ML, Governance, Advisory) to design and deliver end-to-end solutions that drive customer success

Practice Development & Thought Leadership
- Help shape differentiated AI Adoption & Change Management offerings by contributing reusable assets — playbooks, communications plans, training curricula, change impact logs
- Mentor junior consultants and change leads; contribute to internal knowledge sharing and capability building
- Support pre-sales activities as a subject matter expert — contributing to proposals, scoping sessions, and client discovery

Delivery Excellence & Engagement Leadership
- Own end-to-end delivery of AI, data, and analytics change programs — from scoping and planning through execution and optimization
- Establish pragmatic governance and cadence (steering committees, working sessions, status reporting) to keep delivery on track and stakeholders aligned
- Manage RAID logs, delivery milestones, and workstream health across concurrent engagements
- Exhibit strong ownership and accountability in resolving delivery challenges with a bias toward action and exceptional outcomes

Qualitications
- 8+ years as a hands-on Change Management leader owning both OCM strategy and execution for data and AI transformations, including data platforms, advanced analytics, and AI/GenAI solutions
- 4+ years of consulting experience with external clients, managing concurrent engagements and delivering consistent quality across a portfolio of AI and data programs
- Proven experience with the full change lifecycle, including awareness and understanding through pilot, rollout, sustained adoption, and optimization
- Depth in OCM methods: change impact analysis, stakeholder mapping, communications planning, resistance management, and adoption measurement
- Experience delivering change for real-world AI and data programs — cloud data platform migrations, self-service analytics and BI/AI copilot rollouts, data governance implementations, and AI use case deployments
- Strong practical understanding of cloud data platforms, modern analytics, and AI-enabled workflows and the people, process, and role impacts they create
- Familiarity with change management frameworks (e.g., Prosci ADKAR) applied specifically to AI and data platform initiatives in client delivery contexts
- Proven ability to engage senior stakeholders including C-suite sponsors, aligning on strategy, delivery roadmaps, and change approach
- Strong client-facing written and verbal communication skills, able to build executive storylines, tailor narratives for technical and business audiences, and present adoption risks and AI value cases with clarity
- Understanding of evolving AI capabilities (ML, GenAI, AI agents) and how to orchestrate people and process change so AI-enabled solutions are adopted and generate measurable value
- Proven track record supporting or heavily influencing the sales lifecycle: discovery, solution shaping, executive proposals, and helping close large consulting deals

phData celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Our approach helps us to build a winning team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and abilities. So, regardless of how your diversity expresses itself, you can find a home here at phData. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, religion, national origin, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, veteran status, genetic information, disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. If you would like to request an accommodation due to a disability, please contact us at People Operations.

jobs.file: phdjd001 - Advisory - Director, Advisory - AI Adoption & Change Management.txt
jobs.title: Director, Advisory - AI Adoption & Change Management
jobs.body:
Join phData, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack. We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India. We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust. Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment. We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.

6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran, dbt, Atlation, and AWS Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)
Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the US, India, and LATAM

Enterprise AI is moving fast. Enterprise adoption isn't. phData is building the practice that closes that gap, and we need the leader to own it.

We’re seeking a Director of Advisory with a focus on AI Adoption & Change Management to drive enterprise-wide adoption of agentic AI, LLM-powered solutions, foundational data platforms, and modern analytics across our customer organizations. This is a senior, highly visible role sitting at the intersection of sales, delivery, and customer success — with direct impact on revenue, customer satisfaction, and our market positioning as we build and evolve intelligence platforms for customers.

If you have deep roots in AI, data, or analytics-driven transformation, this is the role for you.

Core Responsibilities

Go-to-Market & Sales Leadership
- Lead pre-sales engagements, including discovery sessions, executive workshops, SOW scoping, and storytelling that connects services to measurable business outcomes
- Own pipeline development for adoption and change offerings; build repeatable collateral, playbooks, and case studies
- Define and refine the AI adoption and change management value proposition in partnership with Practice and Sales leadership
- Influence pricing and packaging, balancing value, delivery feasibility, and margin

Delivery Oversight & Engagement Leadership
- Serve as executive sponsor or engagement leader on key AI, LLM, and data adoption programs; own delivery quality, risk management, and business outcomes
- Oversee change roadmaps, stakeholder analyses, communications strategies, enablement plans, and adoption KPIs; ensure AI initiatives are paired with the operating model and role changes needed to realize value
- Coach project managers, change leads, and technical teams to unblock delivery, manage resistance, and protect timelines and scope

Customer Success & Account Growth
- Own satisfaction, renewal, expansion, and referenceability for change and adoption engagements
- Build trusted advisor relationships with executive client sponsors (CIO, CDO, CAO, CHRO, BU leaders), shaping multi-phase roadmaps from pilot to scale
- Track adoption KPIs (usage, behavioral change, time-to-value, productivity lift, AI literacy) and drive voice-of-customer feedback into offerings and delivery methods

Thought Leadership, Practice Development & Internal Leadership
- Create and sponsor thought leadership, frameworks, blueprints for agentic AI and LLM adoption, and reusable assets (diagnostic tools, maturity models, training curricula, stakeholder playbooks)
- Mentor and develop a bench of change management practitioners; define long-term talent strategy for the capability
- Contribute to practice strategy, annual planning, and delivery methodology governance; champion a "run on AI / deliver with AI" culture

Qualifications
- 10+ years in management consulting or advisory, with deep exposure to enterprise transformation programs
- 7+ years leading organizational change management for technology transformations — including AI/ML, data platforms, cloud migrations, digital product rollouts, and operating model change
- Hands-on experience driving adoption of Claude and other AI, LLM, or advanced analytics solutions (e.g., AI copilots, agentic workflows, recommendation engines, self-service analytics)
- Proven track record owning or heavily influencing sales: discovery, solution shaping, executive proposals, and closing large consulting deals
- Demonstrated ability to oversee complex, multi-workstream programs as engagement leader, balancing delivery quality, scope, and financial performance
- Deep familiarity with change management frameworks (Prosci ADKAR, Kotter, ACMP) and experience tailoring them to AI & data contexts
- Exceptional executive communication and storytelling skills — able to translate technical complexity into clear business narratives for diverse personas
- Strong stakeholder management and influence skills, including navigating resistance, aligning sponsors, and facilitating decisions across business and technology
- Fluency in agentic AI architectures, LLM platforms, and modern data and AI stacks (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, cloud providers, vector databases)

phData celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Our approach helps us to build a winning team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and abilities. So, regardless of how your diversity expresses itself, you can find a home here at phData. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, religion, national origin, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, veteran status, genetic information, disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. If you would like to request an accommodation due to a disability, please contact us at People Operations.

jobs.file: phdjd001 - Advisory - Senior Consultant, AI Adoption & Change Management.txt
jobs.title: Senior Consultant, AI Adoption & Change Management
jobs.body:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India.We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran

dbt
, Atlation, and

Partner of the Year

As a Senior Consultant, you'll partner with clients to drive successful adoption of data-driven and AI-enabled solutions by leading the people components of transformation.
Core Responsibilities
Develop and execute change management strategies that align stakeholders.
Build organizational readiness, and accelerate the cultural shifts required to fully realize the value of data, analytics, and AI initiatives.
Work closely with clients to design communication, training, and adoption programs, while effectively managing organization resistance, and ensuring sustainable change.
Facilitate discovery sessions and workshops with client stakeholders to define strategic roadmaps and secure cross-functional alignment on objectives and business value.
Support the expansion of the Advisory practice by developing content, participating in thought leadership, and contributing to the creation of repeatable strategic frameworks and offerings.
Qualifications
4+ years as a hands-on Change Management Consultant, leading change workstreams for transformation programs, ideally including AI and data initiatives.
Proven organizational change management toolkit across:
Change strategy and implementation planning
Stakeholder / impact / readiness assessment
Training and enablement design and delivery
Defining and tracking change success metrics=
Experience designing change solutions for digital, data, analytics, and AI transformations (e.g., data platform builds/migrations, self-service rollouts, data governance programs), with multiple examples of supporting organizations from awareness through adoption.
Ability to translate technical change into people impacts and WIIFM for different stakeholder groups, with solid literacy in cloud/data environments (e.g., cloud infrastructure, data platforms, governance; Snowflake and/or AWS a plus).
Strong collaboration and delivery track record with client stakeholders, technology partners, and cross-functional sales/delivery teams across distributed/global environments.
High ownership and quality bar—able to anticipate and resolve challenges, and consistently produce clear, client-ready deliverables.
Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, including building and delivering compelling, audience-tailored presentations (from technical teams to program/project leadership).
Familiarity with change frameworks, tools, and best practices (e.g., Prosci ADKAR, ACMP/CCMP), with relevant professional certifications strongly preferred.
Willingness to travel as required by clients.

jobs.file: phdjd001 - Advisory - Senior Consultant, Data Governance (MDM).txt
jobs.title: Senior Consultant, Data Governance (MDM)
jobs.body:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India.We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran
,
dbt
, Atlation, and
AWS
Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications

Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the
US
,
India
, and
LATAM
As a Senior Consultant, Data Governance, you'll play a key role in helping clients embed governance and stewardship into their daily work.This is a hands-on role focused on executing governance activities, supporting metadata cataloging, and applying practical data quality controls.Just as important, this person will act as a communicator and facilitator—helping form working groups, align business and technical teams, and coach client staff on how to take ownership as data stewards.
Core Responsibilities
Facilitate data governance working groups to drive alignment between business and technology stakeholders.
Execute metadata management activities such as cataloging, lineage capture, and stewardship workflows.
Partner with business teams to draft and maintain business rules, definitions, and data quality controls.
Apply data quality processes such as profiling, monitoring, and issue management, ensuring rules are practical and adopted.
Support the installation, configuration, rollout and adoption of governance/metadata tools (e.g., Collibra, Alation, Atlan, Purview).
Coach client staff on data stewardship practices—showing them how to govern their data effectively and sustainably.
Communicate governance concepts in clear business language; prepare presentations, training materials, and adoption guides.
Provide input on access controls, privacy, and compliance with regulations (GDPR, CCPA, etc.)
Collaborate with data engineers, analysts, and business owners to embed governance into daily workflows, platform pipelines, modeling practices, and observability.
Metadata Tools & Platform Enablement
Install and configure metadata/catalog tools in client environments.
Build and curate catalogs, including ingestion of technical metadata, business glossaries, and lineage.
Define user personas and design role-appropriate experiences (data stewards, data owners, analysts, engineers).
Tailor tool UX (workflows, dashboards, search optimization) to improve usability and adoption.
Configure governance workflows (e.g., DG asset approvals, stewardship assignments, issue tracking).
Leverage and guide customers on AI-assisted features in modern tools (auto-classification, definition drafting, similarity matching, lineage discovery) to accelerate execution and adoption.
Qualifications
5+ years of experience in data governance, metadata management, MDM, or related roles.
Hands-on experience with data catalog/metadata tools (e.g., Alation, Collibra, Atlan, Purview).
Exposure to data quality tools and processes (Informatica, Talend, Ataccama, or equivalent).
Strong communication skills: able to facilitate workshops, write clear business documentation, and present to mixed audiences.
Demonstrated ability to define and obtain alignment for definition, business rules and data quality controls.
Familiarity with governance operating models and stewardship practices.
Knowledge of privacy regulations (GDPR, CCPA) and how governance practices support compliance.
Willingness to travel as required by clients.
Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, or related field (or equivalent work experience).
Preferred Skills
Experience leading or supporting data governance working groups or stewardship councils.
Knowledge of data access provisioning, integration patterns, or lineage capture.
Experience building adoption materials, training guides, or playbooks for governance programs.
Prior client-facing consulting experience.

jobs.file: phdjd001 - Advisory - Senior Director, Intelligence Platform Strategy & Executive Advisory.txt
jobs.title: Senior Director, Intelligence Platform Strategy & Executive Advisory
jobs.body:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India.We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran
,
dbt
, Atlation, and
AWS
Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)
Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the
US
,
India
, and
LATAM
Role Summary
phData is building an
Executive Advisory
capability to sit at the center of our Intelligence Platform and AI transformation work.This role exists now because our 2026 strategy depends on connecting data & AI platforms to real business value in the boardroom—and then making sure that strategy survives contact with delivery.
Reporting to the Chief Strategy Officer (CSO), you will shape and operationalize our AI and Intelligence Platform offerings, working across Sales, Client Engagement Model (CEM) roles, Practices, and Delivery.You will help define how we run phData on AI, deliver with AI, and grow through AI, while leveraging our multi-geo delivery model (US, India, LATAM).
This is a
hands-on, builder
role for a senior consulting leader who can move fluidly between executive strategy, offering design, deal shaping, and early-stage delivery to create repeatable, scalable patterns for the firm.
What You’ll Do
Strategy & Offerings (≈ 30% of time)
Define and refine the Intelligence Platform and AI advisory offerings.
Connect data platforms, analytics, AI/ML, and agentic workflows to clear business and financial outcomes (growth, efficiency, risk).
Shape how Advisory supports phData’s 2026 AI strategy.
Codify successful approaches into frameworks, toolkits, and templates that are credible in the boardroom and actionable for delivery teams.
Monitor market and partner trends (Snowflake, AWS, etc.) to keep offerings differentiated and up to date.
Go-to-Market & Sales Support (≈ 25% of time)
Partner with Sales and CEM roles to shape and close complex, multi-phase Intelligence Platform and AI transformation deals.
Lead or support executive-facing discovery and framing conversations, helping crystallize the problem statement, value case, and transformation roadmap.
Design and package executive-facing offerings (e.g., CXO workshops, AI/Intelligence Platform briefings) that improve win rates and deal size.
Use advisory engagements to identify and qualify follow-on work across the Intelligence Platform stack.
Support commercial decisions on scope, phasing, and risk, balancing client value with margin and scalability, while respecting the commercial ownership defined in the CEM.
Delivery & Execution (≈ 25% of time)
Personally lead or co-lead key advisory and strategy engagements, including workshops, roadmaps, and executive readouts.
Ensure advisory work is tightly integrated with delivery, so recommendations are implementable by phData’s core practices.
Help stand up early lighthouse programs that demonstrate the Intelligence Platform in action and capture patterns for reuse.
Hold a high bar for executive-ready outputs—structured, concise, financially grounded, and aligned to client strategic narratives.
Internal Enablement & Change (≈ 20% of time)
Equip field teams to position, sell, and deliver advisory and Intelligence Platform offerings through training, artifacts, and shadowing- including effective geo-leverage (US, India, LATAM).
Contribute to consulting methods, toolkits, and operating rhythms that raise quality and consistency across advisory and delivery.
Mentor senior consultants and managers on strategic thinking, executive presence, and storytelling.
Represent Advisory in internal forums, helping align strategy, GTM, and delivery around a coherent Intelligence Platform narrative.
What You’ll Bring
15+ years in data, analytics, AI, or technology consulting, with substantial time in senior advisory and/or delivery leadership roles.
Experience spanning Big 4 or global consulting and at least one smaller, high-growth, or AI-native firm.
Proven track record advising C-suite or senior business/IT leaders on data/AI strategy, investment decisions, and multi-year roadmaps,
and
seeing those strategies through into implementation.
Demonstrated ability to build and sell offerings: packaging services, pricing, positioning, and enablement for the field.
Strong commercial acumen: confident in deal shaping, value-based selling, and navigating trade-offs between growth, margin, and risk.
Ability to earn credibility with senior executives while rolling up your sleeves with solutions, delivery, and geo-distributed teams.
Comfort level with operating in high ambiguity with evolving structures, where you are helping to define the model rather than inheriting it.
Deep understanding of modern data platforms, analytics, and AI/ML, and how they come together as an enterprise Intelligence Platform.
Excellent storytelling, facilitation, and stakeholder management skills with senior business and technology leaders.
Nice-to-haves
Experience in PE-backed or high-growth environments.
Prior exposure to multi-geo delivery models (US, India, LATAM/nearshore)
phData celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.Our approach helps us to build a winning team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and abilities.So, regardless of how your diversity expresses itself, you can find a home here at phData.We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer.We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, religion, national origin, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, veteran status, genetic information, disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.If you would like to request an accommodation due to a disability, please contact us at People Operations.

jobs.file: phdjd001 - Analytics - Principal Analytics Consultant (Power BI).txt
jobs.title: Principal Analytics Consultant (Power BI)
jobs.body:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India.We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran
,
dbt
, Atlation, and
AWS
Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)
Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the
US
,
India
, and
LATAM
Role Overview
We are looking for a Principal Consultant to join our Analytics team.In this role, you will lead the strategy, architecture, and delivery of enterprise Power BI solutions that help clients gain tangible value from their data through analytics enablement, data visualization, and data preparation.You will collaborate closely with business stakeholders, data engineering teams, and practice leadership to shape roadmaps, standardize best practices, and scale modern BI capabilities across organizations.
Key Responsibilities
Client Delivery
Own and drive the design and delivery of advanced Power BI reporting, data models, and analytics solutions for enterprise clients.
Translate business requirements into robust, scalable technical solutions and interactive prototypes that align with phData methodologies, standards, and best practices.
Deliver project-based consulting engagements, including backlog support and development, ensuring work is completed on time, within scope, and with measurable business value.
Create reporting and data visualization solutions that clearly communicate insights to business users and support data-driven decision-making.
Analyze, troubleshoot, and tune performance or deployment issues across Power BI reports, data models, and underlying platforms.
Recommend best practices to optimize data models, DAX calculations, queries, and overall platform architecture, particularly in modern cloud data environments (e.g., Snowflake).
Collaboration & Leadership
Collaborate with cross-functional partners including data engineering, analytics, and client business stakeholders to deliver successful client engagements.
Manage client expectations by leading regular status meetings, providing clear updates, and proactively soliciting feedback through working sessions and demos.
Provide technical and strategic leadership in Power BI, DAX, Power Query, and Power BI Service administration, including security roles and infrastructure setup.
Ensure high quality in deliverables through documentation, validation, testing, and adherence to governance, security, and change management standards.
Partner with practice and account leaders to identify opportunities to expand analytics use cases, improve delivery patterns, and standardize reusable approaches.
Practice & Firm Contribution
Contribute to internal initiatives such as developing Power BI accelerators, templates, governance frameworks, and best-practice playbooks.
Support internal enablement through training, mentoring, and coaching on Power BI, data modeling, and enterprise BI standards.
Represent phData with professionalism in all interactions, communicating clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Additional Responsibilities
Act as a trusted advisor to senior client stakeholders, shaping Power BI and analytics roadmaps, influencing strategic decisions, and guiding long-term initiatives.
Lead teams of consultants to ensure high performance, utilization, and successful project delivery across one or more engagements.
Drive enterprise-scale adoption of Power BI, including standards, governance, security models, and self-service enablement.
Help define and refine practice standards, reusable assets, and delivery frameworks for modern BI and analytics.
About You
You are a client-focused, senior data and analytics consultant who excels at leading complex Power BI initiatives from strategy through implementation.You are comfortable partnering with senior stakeholders, guiding teams, and turning ambiguous business needs into scalable, governed analytics solutions.You thrive in a fast-paced, outcomes-driven environment and enjoy collaborating with distributed, global teams.
Required Qualifications
Experience
7+ years of experience in data analytics and data visualization platforms in an enterprise environment.
3+ years of external consulting experience delivering data and analytics solutions to clients.
Technical / Functional Skills
Expertise in data visualization and data modeling with Power BI, including complex data models and interactive dashboards.
Power BI Service administration experience, including security roles, workspace design, and infrastructure setup.
Strong proficiency in DAX and Power Query for advanced calculations, transformations, and data shaping.
Knowledge of SQL and experience leveraging data warehouses, data marts, and/or data models (Snowflake environment preferred).
Demonstrated expertise in data fluency and communicating analytical insights and recommendations to business users.
Ability to identify and recommend functionality and solutions to meet and enhance user and stakeholder requirements.
Experience recommending and applying best practices for optimizing data models, reports, and overall analytics platform architecture.
Consulting / Delivery Skills
Experience delivering projects for external or internal clients in a professional services or consulting environment.
Ability to break down complex problems into structured, actionable steps and drive them through to completion.
Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.
Collaboration & Ownership
Demonstrated ability to work effectively with distributed and cross-functional teams in a remote-first environment.
Exceptional customer-facing skills, with a proven track record of building trust and long-term relationships with senior stakeholders.
Proven track record of taking ownership, managing multiple priorities, and delivering high-quality work with minimal supervision.
Strong problem-solving skills with a passion for learning and mastering new technologies, techniques, and procedures.
Preferred Qualifications
Preferred qualifications help candidates stand out but are not required for success in this role.
Previous experience scaling Power BI at an enterprise level, including governance, standards, and self-service enablement.
Previous experience leading teams of consultants to ensure performance, utilization, and successful project delivery.
Data preparation experience using Alteryx or KNIME (or similar tools like Matillion, Dataiku, or Coalesce).
Experience in specific industry verticals or problem spaces relevant to enterprise analytics.
Prior experience working in global or remote teams and partnering across US, LATAM, and/or India.
Contributions to open source, technical communities, speaking, writing, or internal accelerators are a plus.
Location & Time Zone Expectations
This role is based in LATAM
We are a remote-first company, and you should be comfortable working with a distributed global team.
Some flexibility may be required to collaborate across time zones with colleagues and clients.
Client needs may occasionally require flexibility in working hours to support key milestones or workshops.
Why phData?
Impactful Work:
Partner with leading organizations on meaningful data & AI initiatives.
Collaborative Culture:
Work with a supportive, high-performing global team that values transparency, autonomy, and continuous improvement.
Growth Opportunities:
Access to challenging projects, mentorship, and structured development pathways.
Values-Driven:
We prioritize doing the right thing for our clients, our teams, and our community.
Benefits at phData
Remote-First Work Environment
Casual, award-winning small-business work environment
Collaborative culture that prizes autonomy, creativity, and transparency
Competitive comp, excellent benefits, generous PTO plan plus 10 Holidays (and other cool perks)
Accelerated learning and professional development through advanced training and certifications
phData celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.Our approach helps us to build a winning team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and abilities.So, regardless of how your diversity expresses itself, you can find a home here at phData.We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer.We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, religion, national origin, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, veteran status, genetic information, disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.If you would like to request an accommodation due to a disability, please contact us at People Operations.

Overview:
We are seeking a Senior Consultant with deep experience in platforms such as Microsoft Copilot Studio, Snowflake, and Glean to help clients realize tangible, business-ready value from AI agents.Our consulting services emphasize analytics and agentic activation, data visualization, data preparation, and data science.We specialize in Snowflake, Power BI, Tableau, Sigma, Alteryx, KNIME, and AWS.
Responsibilities
Design, build, and deploy AI agents using Microsoft Copilot Studio, aligned to real business processes and roles.
Translate manual or semi-structured business workflows into autonomous agents using low-code/no-code tools within the Microsoft ecosystem.
Implement agentic behaviors, including planning, tool use, contextual memory, and reflection, to deliver intelligent task execution.
Integrate Copilot solutions with enterprise systems such as Power BI, SharePoint, Outlook, and Teams.
Support internal teams in enablement, governance, lifecycle management, and safe experimentation with Copilot agents.
Develop and iterate on prompt templates, AI guardrails, fallback strategies, and continuous feedback loops to improve agent performance.
Partner with IT, data, and security teams to ensure responsible, governed, and scalable agent deployments.
Qualifications
3–6 years of experience in enterprise automation, digital transformation, or AI-enabled consulting.
Direct experience with Microsoft Copilot Studio or similar low-code AI platforms (e.g., Glean, AgentForce, Amazon Q Business, OpenAI Agent Builder).
Solid understanding of semantic layers, identity/access management, and Microsoft 365 security/compliance boundaries.
Experience facilitating automation/AI discovery and prioritization sessions (process mapping, value sizing, ROI modeling) with business stakeholders.
Passion for enabling the business to develop their own business process solutions with technology
Familiarity with prompt engineering, iterative design cycles, and user testing for AI workflows.
Strong collaboration and communication skills across business and technical audiences.
Exposure to Power Platform, Azure OpenAI, n8n, or broader AI orchestration tools is a plus.
Preferred Experience:
Previous experience scaling Power BI at an enterprise level
Previous experience leading teams of consultants to ensure performance, utilization and project delivery
Experience operating in early-stage, ambiguous environments, where clients are experimenting with Copilot and agentic workflows across multiple functions.
Design and support change management and enablement programs (playbooks, training, office hours) to help business users adopt Copilot agents and AI workflows at scale.
Why phData?We offer:
Remote-First Work Environment
Casual, award-winning small-business work environment
Collaborative culture that prizes autonomy, creativity, and transparency
Competitive comp, excellent benefits, generous PTO plan plus 10 Holidays (and other cool perks)
Accelerated learning and professional development through advanced training and certifications

Overview:
We are seeking a Principal Consultant with deep experience in platforms such as Microsoft Copilot Studio, Snowflake, and Glean to help clients realize tangible, business-ready value from AI agents.Our consulting services emphasize analytics and agentic activation, data visualization, data preparation, and data science.We specialize in Snowflake, Power BI, Tableau, Sigma, Alteryx, KNIME, and AWS.
Responsibilities
Design, build, and deploy AI agents using Microsoft Copilot Studio, aligned to real business processes and roles.
Translate manual or semi-structured business workflows into autonomous agents using low-code/no-code tools within the Microsoft ecosystem.
Implement agentic behaviors, including planning, tool use, contextual memory, and reflection, to deliver intelligent task execution.
Integrate Copilot solutions with enterprise systems such as Power BI, SharePoint, Outlook, and Teams.
Support internal teams in enablement, governance, lifecycle management, and safe experimentation with Copilot agents.
Develop and iterate on prompt templates, AI guardrails, fallback strategies, and continuous feedback loops to improve agent performance.
Partner with IT, data, and security teams to ensure responsible, governed, and scalable agent deployments.
Embed alongside client analytics and BI teams in a staff‑augmentation model, pairing on real Glean use cases while modeling best practices in semantic modeling, governance, and agent design.
Lead recurring enablement touchpoints (developer workshops, guided build sessions, office hours) to help client teams independently design, deploy, and iterate on Glean agents.
Co‑create reusable enablement assets (playbooks, labs, prompt libraries, “how‑to” guides) that client champions can use to scale training across business units.
Qualifications
3–6 years of experience in enterprise automation, digital transformation, or AI-enabled consulting.
Direct experience with Microsoft Copilot Studio or similar low-code AI platforms (e.g., Glean, AgentForce, Amazon Q Business, OpenAI Agent Builder).
3-5 years of BI experience, including advanced knowledge of ETL, SQL, and data visualization best practices.
Solid understanding of semantic layers, identity/access management, and Microsoft 365 security/compliance boundaries.
Experience facilitating automation/AI discovery and prioritization sessions (process mapping, value sizing, ROI modeling) with business stakeholders.
Passion for enabling the business to develop their own business process solutions with technology
Familiarity with prompt engineering, iterative design cycles, and user testing for AI workflows.
Strong collaboration and communication skills across business and technical audiences.
Exposure to Power Platform, Azure OpenAI, n8n, or broader AI orchestration tools is a plus.
Preferred Experience:
Previous experience leading teams of consultants to ensure performance, utilization and project delivery
Experience operating in early-stage, ambiguous environments, where clients are experimenting with Copilot and agentic workflows across multiple functions.
Design and support change management and enablement programs (playbooks, training, office hours) to help business users adopt Copilot agents and AI workflows at scale.
Experience delivering tool enablement at scale (cohorts, train‑the‑trainer, or office‑hours programs) for modern BI or AI platforms such as Alteryx, Sigma, Power BI, or MS Copilot.
Prior consulting or staff‑augmentation experience balancing “hands‑on keyboard” delivery with coaching client developers and analysts to own and extend solutions over time.

jobs.title: Principal Consultant (AI Workforce - Snowflake Intelligence)
jobs.body:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India.We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran
,
dbt
, Atlation, and
AWS
Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)
Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the
US
,
India
, and
LATAM
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Fivetran, dbt, Sigma Award Winners)
7x Best Places to Work
Inc 5000 Fastest Growing US Companies (2020-2023)
Overview
We’re looking for a Principal Consultant who specializes in
Snowflake Intelligence, Cortex AI, and low-code/no-code (LCNC) agentic platforms
to help our customers build an “AI Workforce” that delivers tangible, business-ready value from their data.Our consulting services emphasize analytics and agentic activation, data visualization, data preparation, and data science.We specialize in Snowflake, Power BI, Tableau, Sigma, Alteryx, KNIME, and AWS.
Principal Consultants in Analytics demonstrate strategic leadership and exceptional delivery excellence, independently managing and executing complex initiatives while balancing delivery, people leadership, and practice growth.In this role, you will define how Snowflake Intelligence and Cortex AI are used to create secure, scalable, and maintainable AI agents across some of the world’s largest enterprises.
Responsibilities
Partner with senior and C‑Suite stakeholders to identify “agent‑first” opportunities across business units and define multi‑phase AI Workforce roadmaps tied to clear business outcomes.
Lead the design of complex, production‑grade agentic systems using Snowflake Intelligence (no‑code/low‑code) and Cortex Search/Analyst, emphasizing configuration and semantic modeling over custom code.
Design multi‑step “Reasoning & Acting” (ReAct) flows using Snowflake’s UI, semantic layers, and native apps to orchestrate tools, policies, and data workflows.
Architect high‑accuracy retrieval‑augmented generation (RAG) and knowledge solutions using Cortex Search, with patterns for content onboarding, relevance tuning, evaluation, and continuous improvement.
Advise on necessary Snowflake Horizon policies and related governance capabilities to ensure agents are secure, auditable, and compliant with client and industry standards.
Lead the most complex, ambiguous Snowflake AI engagements from discovery through production, acting as the escalation point and “safety net” for critical Snowflake Intelligence accounts.
Develop phData‑wide blueprints, reference architectures, playbooks, guardrail templates, and ROI frameworks for Snowflake Intelligence–based agent deployments.
Mentor Consultants and Senior Consultants, modeling how to own projects end‑to‑end and effectively engage executive stakeholders, while evangelizing LCNC agentic patterns across the practice.
Partner with Sales and Solutions Engineering to scope complex AI Workforce opportunities, contribute to proposals, and help grow existing accounts by identifying “what’s next” for AI Workforce.
Qualifications
8+ years in professional services or consulting with a proven track record leading multi‑million‑dollar digital, analytics, or AI transformations for enterprise clients.
Deep expertise with Snowflake, including platform architecture, security, performance, and governance; comfortable with SQL/Python but biased toward native, low‑code features (Intelligence, Cortex, Native Apps) for maintainability and speed‑to‑market.
Demonstrated experience designing and delivering AI/analytics solutions that span data engineering, BI/analytics, and business process change, beyond prototypes or proofs‑of‑concept.
Significant hands‑on experience with enterprise LCNC tools (e.g., Copilot Studio, Agentforce, n8n, Make, Zapier Central) and a passion for bringing those patterns into the Snowflake Data Cloud.
Proven ability to engage directly with senior and executive stakeholders and frame AI Workforce value in terms of OpEx reduction, risk reduction, and revenue growth.
Experience leading cross‑functional project teams (consultants, data engineers, architects), including coaching and mentoring others in delivery excellence and career development.
Strong communication skills across business and technical audiences, including the ability to clearly distinguish a simple “chatbot” from an autonomous Snowflake agent for non‑technical leaders.
A bias for action, collaborative mindset, and ability to thrive in early‑adopter environments where patterns are still emerging and you help define the standards.
Preferred Experience:
Previous experience scaling Snowflake or similar data platforms at an enterprise level (e.g., platform adoption, governance programs, or Centers of Excellence).
Previous experience leading teams of consultants to ensure performance, utilization, project delivery success, and career growth.
Data preparation and orchestration experience using tools such as Alteryx, KNIME, Matillion, Dataiku, or Coalesce.
Experience operating in early‑stage, ambiguous environments where clients are experimenting with Snowflake Intelligence, Cortex, and agentic workflows across multiple functions.
Experience designing or supporting change management and enablement programs (playbooks, training, office hours) to help business users adopt AI agents and AI workflows at scale.
Why phData?We offer:
Remote-First Work Environment
Casual, award-winning small-business work environment
Collaborative culture that prizes autonomy, creativity, and transparency
Competitive comp, excellent benefits, generous PTO plan plus 10 Holidays (and other cool perks)
Accelerated learning and professional development through advanced training and certifications
phData celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.Our approach helps us to build a winning team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and abilities.So, regardless of how your diversity expresses itself, you can find a home here at phData.We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer.We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, religion, national origin, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, veteran status, genetic information, disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.If you would like to request an accommodation due to a disability, please contact us at People Operations.

jobs.file: phdjd001 - Analytics - Senior Analytics Consultant (Power BI) (1).txt
jobs.title: Senior Analytics Consultant (Power BI)
jobs.body:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India.We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran
,
dbt
, Atlation, and
AWS
Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)
Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the
US
,
India
, and
LATAM
Role Overview
We are looking for a Senior Consultant to join our Analytics team.In this role, you will help clients gain tangible value from their data by enabling analytics, data visualization, and self-service BI solutions on modern data platforms.You will collaborate closely with business and technical stakeholders to translate requirements into impactful dashboards, reports, and data models.You will work with technologies such as Power BI, Alteryx, KNIME, and Snowflake to deliver scalable, high-quality solutions and advance phData’s delivery excellence.
Key Responsibilities
Client Delivery
Own and drive the design and delivery of analytics, reporting, and data visualization solutions for enterprise clients using tools such as Power BI.
Translate business requirements into technical solutions and interactive prototypes that align with phData methodologies, standards, and best practices.
Deliver project-based consulting engagements, including backlog support and development, ensuring work is delivered on time, within scope, and with measurable business value.
Analyze, troubleshoot, and tune performance or deployment issues across reports, data models, and underlying platforms as needed.
Recommend best practices to optimize data models, reports, and overall platform architecture, particularly in modern cloud data environments (e.g., Snowflake).
Collaboration & Leadership
Collaborate with cross-functional partners including data engineering, analytics, and client business stakeholders to deliver successful client engagements.
Manage client expectations by leading regular status meetings, providing clear updates, and proactively soliciting feedback through working sessions and demos.
Provide technical leadership in the use of Power BI and data preparation tools (e.g., Alteryx, KNIME), guiding clients on how to scale and govern their analytics solutions.
Ensure high quality in deliverables through documentation, validation, and adherence to governance, security, and change management standards.
Partner with practice and account leaders to identify opportunities to expand analytics use cases, improve delivery patterns, and standardize reusable approaches.
Practice & Firm Contribution
Contribute to internal initiatives such as developing accelerators, templates, and best-practice playbooks for Power BI, data preparation, and modern BI.
Share knowledge with peers through mentoring, informal coaching, and collaborative problem solving.
Represent phData with professionalism in all interactions, communicating clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
About You
You are a client-focused data and analytics consultant who enjoys turning complex business questions into clear, actionable insights.You are comfortable working across visualization, data preparation, and SQL-based data platforms, and you communicate effectively with both technical and business users.You thrive in a fast-paced, outcomes-driven environment and enjoy collaborating with distributed, global teams.
Required Qualifications
Experience
3+ years of experience in data analytics and data visualization platforms in an enterprise environment.
Technical / Functional Skills
Strong data visualization skills using Power BI, including building interactive reports and dashboards.
Data preparation experience using Alteryx or KNIME (or similar tools such as Matillion, Dataiku, or Coalesce).
Knowledge of SQL and experience working with data warehouses, data marts, and/or data models (Snowflake preferred).
Ability to identify and recommend functionality and solutions to meet and enhance user requirements.
Experience recommending and applying best practices for optimizing data models, reports, and overall analytics platform architecture.
Consulting / Delivery Skills
Experience delivering projects for external or internal clients in a professional services, consulting, or similar client-facing environment.
Demonstrated expertise in data fluency and communicating analytical insights and recommendations to business users.
Ability to break down complex problems into structured, actionable steps and drive them through to completion.
Strong written and verbal communication skills, including facilitating status meetings and working sessions with clients.
Solid project management skills with the ability to manage expectations, timelines, and priorities.
Collaboration & Ownership
Demonstrated ability to work effectively with distributed and cross-functional teams in a remote-first environment.
Exceptional customer-facing skills, with a proven track record of building trust and long-term relationships.
Proven track record of taking ownership, managing multiple priorities, and delivering high-quality work with minimal supervision.
Strong problem-solving skills with a passion for learning and mastering new technologies, techniques, and procedures.
Preferred Qualifications
Preferred qualifications help candidates stand out but are not required for success in this role.
2+ years of consulting experience delivering analytics or BI solutions to enterprise clients.
Expertise with Power Platform components such as Power Automate, Power Apps, and Power Virtual Agents.
Experience with Power BI Service administration, including security roles, infrastructure setup, and governance.
Previous experience scaling Power BI at an enterprise level, including standards, governance, and enablement.
Previous experience leading teams of consultants or developers to ensure performance, utilization, and successful project delivery.
Experience in specific industry verticals or problem spaces relevant to data and analytics.
Prior experience working in global or remote teams and partnering across US, LATAM, and/or India.
Contributions to open source, technical communities, speaking, writing, or internal accelerators are a plus.
Location & Time Zone Expectations
This role is based in LATAM.
We are a remote-first company, and you should be comfortable working with a distributed global team.
Some flexibility may be required to collaborate across time zones with colleagues and clients.
Client needs may occasionally require flexibility in working hours to support key milestones or workshops.
Why phData?
Impactful Work:
Partner with leading organizations on meaningful data & AI initiatives.
Collaborative Culture:
Work with a supportive, high-performing global team that values transparency, autonomy, and continuous improvement.
Growth Opportunities:
Access to challenging projects, mentorship, and structured development pathways.
Values-Driven:
We prioritize doing the right thing for our clients, our teams, and our community.
Benefits at phData
Remote-First Work Environment
Casual, award-winning small-business work environment
Collaborative culture that prizes autonomy, creativity, and transparency
Competitive comp, excellent benefits, generous PTO plan plus 10 Holidays (and other cool perks)
Accelerated learning and professional development through advanced training and certifications
phData celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.Our approach helps us to build a winning team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and abilities.So, regardless of how your diversity expresses itself, you can find a home here at phData.We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer.We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, religion, national origin, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, veteran status, genetic information, disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.If you would like to request an accommodation due to a disability, please contact us at People Operations.

jobs.file: phdjd001 - Analytics - Senior Consultant (AI Workforce - Copilot) - LATAM - Remote (1).txt
jobs.title: Senior Consultant (AI Workforce - Copilot)
jobs.body:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India.We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran
,
dbt
, Atlation, and
AWS
Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)
Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the
US
,
India
, and
LATAM
Overview:
We are seeking a Senior Consultant with deep experience in platforms such as Microsoft Copilot Studio, Snowflake, and Glean to help clients realize tangible, business-ready value from AI agents.Our consulting services emphasize analytics and agentic activation, data visualization, data preparation, and data science.We specialize in Snowflake, Power BI, Tableau, Sigma, Alteryx, KNIME, and AWS.
Responsibilities
Design, build, and deploy AI agents using Microsoft Copilot Studio, aligned to real business processes and roles.
Translate manual or semi-structured business workflows into autonomous agents using low-code/no-code tools within the Microsoft ecosystem.
Implement agentic behaviors, including planning, tool use, contextual memory, and reflection, to deliver intelligent task execution.
Integrate Copilot solutions with enterprise systems such as Power BI, SharePoint, Outlook, and Teams.
Support internal teams in enablement, governance, lifecycle management, and safe experimentation with Copilot agents.
Develop and iterate on prompt templates, AI guardrails, fallback strategies, and continuous feedback loops to improve agent performance.
Partner with IT, data, and security teams to ensure responsible, governed, and scalable agent deployments.
Qualifications
3–6 years of experience in enterprise automation, digital transformation, or AI-enabled consulting.
Direct experience with Microsoft Copilot Studio or similar low-code AI platforms (e.g., Glean, AgentForce, Amazon Q Business, OpenAI Agent Builder).
Solid understanding of semantic layers, identity/access management, and Microsoft 365 security/compliance boundaries.
Experience facilitating automation/AI discovery and prioritization sessions (process mapping, value sizing, ROI modeling) with business stakeholders.
Passion for enabling the business to develop their own business process solutions with technology
Familiarity with prompt engineering, iterative design cycles, and user testing for AI workflows.
Strong collaboration and communication skills across business and technical audiences.
Exposure to Power Platform, Azure OpenAI, n8n, or broader AI orchestration tools is a plus.
Preferred Experience:
Previous experience scaling Power BI at an enterprise level
Previous experience leading teams of consultants to ensure performance, utilization and project delivery
Experience operating in early-stage, ambiguous environments, where clients are experimenting with Copilot and agentic workflows across multiple functions.
Design and support change management and enablement programs (playbooks, training, office hours) to help business users adopt Copilot agents and AI workflows at scale.
Why phData?We offer:
Remote-First Work Environment
Casual, award-winning small-business work environment
Collaborative culture that prizes autonomy, creativity, and transparency
Competitive comp, excellent benefits, generous PTO plan plus 10 Holidays (and other cool perks)
Accelerated learning and professional development through advanced training and certifications

jobs.file: phdjd001 - Analytics - Senior Consultant (AI Workforce - Copilot) - US - Remote (1).txt
jobs.title: Senior Consultant (AI Workforce - Copilot)
jobs.body:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India.We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran
,
dbt
, Atlation, and
AWS
Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)
Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the
US
,
India
, and
LATAM
Role Overview
We are looking for a Senior Consultant to join our Analytics & Agentic Activation team.In this role, you will design, build, and scale AI agents and analytics solutions that turn manual or semi-structured business workflows into governed, business-ready automations.You will work across the Microsoft ecosystem (including Microsoft Copilot Studio and Power BI), Snowflake, and modern BI platforms to help clients unlock value from generative AI and data.You will collaborate closely with business stakeholders, IT, data, and security teams to deliver high-quality solutions and advance phData’s delivery excellence.
Key Responsibilities
Client Delivery
Own and drive the design, build, and deployment of AI agents using Microsoft Copilot Studio for high-impact enterprise workflows and business roles.
Translate manual or semi-structured business workflows into autonomous agents using low-code/no-code tools within the Microsoft ecosystem.
Implement agentic behaviors, including planning, tool use, contextual memory, and reflection, to deliver intelligent task execution and measurable automation outcomes.
Integrate Copilot solutions with enterprise systems such as Power BI, SharePoint, Outlook, and Teams to embed AI into day-to-day work.
Develop and iterate on prompt templates, AI guardrails, fallback strategies, and continuous feedback loops to improve agent performance over time.
Ensure engagements are delivered on time, within scope, and with measurable business value for clients.
Collaboration & Leadership
Collaborate with cross-functional partners, including business stakeholders, IT, data, analytics, and security teams, to deliver successful client engagements.
Provide technical and strategic leadership during automation and AI discovery sessions, process mapping workshops, design reviews, and project delivery.
Ensure high quality in deliverables through rigorous testing, documentation, governance, and adherence to security and compliance best practices.
Partner with practice and account leaders to identify opportunities to expand Copilot and AI agent use cases, improve delivery patterns, and standardize reusable solutions.
Practice & Firm Contribution
Contribute to internal initiatives such as IP development, accelerators, templates, playbooks, and training related to Copilot, AI agents, and analytics.
Help develop and refine best practices for prompt engineering, agent lifecycle management, and responsible AI within the Microsoft ecosystem.
Support internal enablement efforts that empower business users and analysts to create and maintain their own business process solutions with technology.
Represent phData with professionalism in all interactions, communicating clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Additional Responsibilities
Act as a trusted advisor to senior client stakeholders, shaping AI and automation roadmaps, influencing strategic decisions, and guiding long-term initiatives as clients experiment with Copilot and agentic workflows across multiple functions.
Mentor and coach team members and client users, fostering a culture of learning, feedback, and continuous improvement in AI agent and analytics practices.
Help define and refine practice standards, reusable assets, delivery frameworks, and enablement programs (e.g., playbooks, training, office hours) to support scaled adoption of Copilot agents and AI workflows.
About You
You are a client-focused consultant and problem solver who enjoys working in a fast-paced, outcomes-driven environment.You are passionate about using AI, analytics, and automation to streamline business processes and empower business users.You are comfortable operating in distributed, global teams and partnering with colleagues and stakeholders across time zones.
Required Qualifications
Experience
3–6 years of experience in enterprise automation, digital transformation, or AI-enabled consulting.
3–5 years of hands-on experience with Microsoft Power BI, including advanced DAX, Power Query, and enterprise-scale data modeling and visualization.
Technical / Functional Skills
Direct experience with Microsoft Copilot Studio or similar low-code AI platforms (e.g., Glean, AgentForce, Amazon Q Business, OpenAI Agent Builder).
Strong Power BI skills, including data modeling, report design, and data visualization best practices.
Solid understanding of semantic layers, identity and access management, and Microsoft 365 security and compliance boundaries.
Familiarity with prompt engineering, iterative design cycles, and user testing for AI workflows.
Exposure to Power Platform, Azure OpenAI, n8n, or broader AI orchestration tools.
Experience with modern data and analytics platforms such as Snowflake, Tableau, Sigma, Alteryx, KNIME, and/or AWS.
Consulting / Delivery Skills
Experience delivering projects for external or internal clients in a professional services or consulting environment, ideally focused on analytics, automation, or AI.
Experience facilitating automation/AI discovery and prioritization sessions (process mapping, value sizing, ROI modeling) with business stakeholders.
Ability to break down complex problems into structured, actionable steps and drive them through to completion.
Strong written and verbal communication skills in English, with the ability to translate between business and technical audiences.
Collaboration & Ownership
Demonstrated ability to work effectively with distributed and cross-functional teams, including business, IT, data, and security stakeholders.
Proven track record of taking ownership, managing multiple priorities, and delivering high-quality work with minimal supervision.
Passion for enabling business users to develop their own business process solutions with technology.
Preferred Qualifications
Preferred qualifications help candidates stand out but are not required for success in this role.
Experience in scaling Power BI and analytics solutions at an enterprise level.
Hands-on experience designing and supporting change management and enablement programs (playbooks, training, office hours) to help business users adopt Copilot agents and AI workflows at scale.
Experience leading teams of consultants and contributing to performance, utilization, and high-quality project delivery.
Experience operating in early-stage, ambiguous environments where clients are experimenting with Copilot and agentic workflows across multiple functions.
Hands-on experience with additional tools such as Tableau, Sigma, Alteryx, KNIME, or AWS.
Prior experience working in global or remote teams and partnering across US, LATAM, and/or India.
Contributions to open source, professional communities, speaking, writing, or internal accelerators are a plus.
Location & Time Zone Expectations
This role is based in the US.
We are a remote-first company, and you should be comfortable working with a distributed global team.
Some flexibility may be required to collaborate across time zones with colleagues and clients.
Client needs may occasionally require flexibility in working hours to support key milestones or workshops.
Why phData?
Impactful Work:
Partner with leading organizations on meaningful data & AI initiatives.
Collaborative Culture:
Work with a supportive, high-performing global team that values transparency, autonomy, and continuous improvement.
Growth Opportunities:
Access to challenging projects, mentorship, and structured development pathways.
Values-Driven:
We prioritize doing the right thing for our clients, our teams, and our community.
Benefits at phData
US:
Remote-First Work Environment
401k plan with company match
Dental and Vision insurance
Home Office Equipment Stipend
Annual stipend for Learning and Development
Competitive comp, excellent benefits, 4 weeks PTO plan plus 10 Holidays (and other cool perks)
phData celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.Our approach helps us to build a winning team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and abilities.So, regardless of how your diversity expresses itself, you can find a home here at phData.We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer.We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, religion, national origin, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, veteran status, genetic information, disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.If you would like to request an accommodation due to a disability, please contact us at People Operations.

jobs.title: Senior Consultant (AI Workforce - Glean)
jobs.body:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India.We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran
,
dbt
, Atlation, and
AWS
Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)
Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the
US
,
India
, and
LATAM
Overview:
We are seeking a Senior Consultant with deep experience in platforms such as Microsoft Copilot Studio, Snowflake, and Glean to help clients realize tangible, business-ready value from AI agents.Our consulting services emphasize analytics and agentic activation, data visualization, data preparation, and data science.We specialize in Snowflake, Power BI, Tableau, Sigma, Alteryx, KNIME, and AWS.
Responsibilities
Design, build, and deploy AI agents using Microsoft Copilot Studio, aligned to real business processes and roles.
Translate manual or semi-structured business workflows into autonomous agents using low-code/no-code tools within the Microsoft ecosystem.
Implement agentic behaviors, including planning, tool use, contextual memory, and reflection, to deliver intelligent task execution.
Integrate Copilot solutions with enterprise systems such as Power BI, SharePoint, Outlook, and Teams.
Support internal teams in enablement, governance, lifecycle management, and safe experimentation with Copilot agents.
Develop and iterate on prompt templates, AI guardrails, fallback strategies, and continuous feedback loops to improve agent performance.
Partner with IT, data, and security teams to ensure responsible, governed, and scalable agent deployments.
Embed alongside client analytics and BI teams in a staff‑augmentation model, pairing on real Glean use cases while modeling best practices in semantic modeling, governance, and agent design.
Lead recurring enablement touchpoints (developer workshops, guided build sessions, office hours) to help client teams independently design, deploy, and iterate on Glean agents.
Co‑create reusable enablement assets (playbooks, labs, prompt libraries, “how‑to” guides) that client champions can use to scale training across business units.
Qualifications
3–6 years of experience in enterprise automation, digital transformation, or AI-enabled consulting.
Direct experience with Microsoft Copilot Studio or similar low-code AI platforms (e.g., Glean, AgentForce, Amazon Q Business, OpenAI Agent Builder).
3-5 years of BI experience, including advanced knowledge of ETL, SQL, and data visualization best practices.
Solid understanding of semantic layers, identity/access management, and Microsoft 365 security/compliance boundaries.
Experience facilitating automation/AI discovery and prioritization sessions (process mapping, value sizing, ROI modeling) with business stakeholders.
Passion for enabling the business to develop their own business process solutions with technology
Familiarity with prompt engineering, iterative design cycles, and user testing for AI workflows.
Strong collaboration and communication skills across business and technical audiences.
Exposure to Power Platform, Azure OpenAI, n8n, or broader AI orchestration tools is a plus.
Preferred Experience:
Previous experience leading teams of consultants to ensure performance, utilization and project delivery
Experience operating in early-stage, ambiguous environments, where clients are experimenting with Copilot and agentic workflows across multiple functions.
Design and support change management and enablement programs (playbooks, training, office hours) to help business users adopt Copilot agents and AI workflows at scale.
Experience delivering tool enablement at scale (cohorts, train‑the‑trainer, or office‑hours programs) for modern BI or AI platforms such as Alteryx, Sigma, Power BI, or MS Copilot.
Prior consulting or staff‑augmentation experience balancing “hands‑on keyboard” delivery with coaching client developers and analysts to own and extend solutions over time.
