About phData:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024,2025)
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Fivetran, dbt, Sigma)
9x Best Places to Work
Inc 5000 Fastest Growing US Companies (2020-2024)
We’re looking for an experienced Senior Program Manager who will help lead us through our next phase of growth.We’ve built our brand and our position in the market on the back of delivering incredible results for our clients.As a result, we have projects with some of the largest and most well-known companies in the world.
In this role, the Senior Program Manager oversees multiple high visibility projects leveraging varying SDLC’s, ensuring alignment across internal teams, including sales and delivery, and key customer/partner stakeholders. The ideal candidate is a seasoned consulting leader and outstanding communicator with a strong track record of managing and scaling large, strategic customer portfolios (>$10M) and developing a robust delivery organization.A core part of this role will also involve nurturing future leaders within the team, helping us grow responsibly while staying true to our engineering principles and positive culture.This is an exciting opportunity for someone with a bias for action that is ready to take on high-impact responsibilities and drive our next stage of growth.
About You:
You bring structure to ambiguity, clarity to complexity, and a steady hand to fast-moving teams.
You are a high-horsepower self-starter with a track record of taking on complex challenges and seeing them through to completion.
You are proactive, composed under pressure, and confident in making informed decisions.
You naturally “look around corners”, see things before your team/customers do, guide them to take advantage of opportunities, and surface risks before they become issues.
You are able to see/understand the business value of the scope of work (project), and steer the team to implement the objectives.
You are skilled in building and nurturing relationships, with a natural ability to connect with others.
You are adept at uniting team members from diverse backgrounds and locations to achieve shared goals.
You are attentive to both verbal and nonverbal communication, actively listening to understand.
You are passionate about identifying and implementing process improvements to boost efficiency and embracing automation/AI to streamline operations, and the Agile process.
You are energized by fast-paced, dynamic environments that evolve quickly.
You are eager to gain a broad understanding of new and complex technologies.
You take full ownership, stay accountable, and drive the technical team to meet expectations, deadlines, and quality
You are a proven liaison between delivery teams, the client, and account leadership, connecting the team’s execution to the client’s strategy and showcasing our technical capabilities.
You are a driver, whether it’s deadlines, team morale, transparency, feedback or solutions.
Job Requirements:
15+ years of Technical Program Management delivering complex, multi-workstream initiatives; hands-on ownership of customer relationships, timelines, scope, budgets, and resources (architects and engineers) for data and AI projects.
Proven ability to manage 4-5 customers concurrently while maintaining 85%+ billable utilization; consistent record of on-time, on-budget delivery.
Worked on, or awareness of Snowflake, Databricks, dbt, Fivetran, PowerBI, Tableau and Sigma technologies.
Should have people management experience, leading high-performance teams.
Hands-on Portfolio/Program Management expertise with Agile methodologies and strong understanding of Waterfall; able to select and tailor approaches for outcomes.
Demonstrated proficiency with Jira, Azure DevOps, MS Project, and Microsoft 365 (Excel); strong technical and process documentation skills.
Exceptional written, verbal, and presentation skills; produces executive-ready updates and drives clear decision-making with C-level stakeholders.
Highly organized and self-directed; excels at time management and prioritization across competing initiatives.
Strong analytical, decision-making, and critical-thinking skills; exercises independent judgment and escalates with clarity when needed.
Direct client-facing experience in a consulting or professional services organization, including navigating complex stakeholder landscapes.
Bachelor’s degree in IT or a related technical field preferred.
PMP and CSM certifications strongly preferred; additional credentials
The Ideal Candidate will:
Take full ownership of programs for phData’s largest strategic accounts, driving success from discovery to execution and scale with minimal supervision
Build and maintain strong relationships with internal sales and delivery leadership to drive overall customer success and account health.
Connect client strategic objectives to project outcomes by crafting a clear narrative of how our work drives measurable value; create executive-ready enablement (updates, ROI snapshots, case studies) and partner with sponsors to socialize and sell success internally across stakeholder groups
Translate business objectives into actionable data and AI roadmaps with measurable milestones; align architecture, engineering, and delivery work to measurable outcomes.
Lead and mentor multidisciplinary teams, elevating delivery quality, efficiency, and professional development; coach other PMs/TPMs as needed.
Own project and portfolio financials, including revenue targets, margin management, forecasting, and reporting; identify levers to improve profitability.
Ensure rigorous project governance with operating cadences, clear RACI, risk/issue/decision logs, change control, and stakeholder communications.
Proactively identify and mitigate risks across delivery, scope, and resourcing; create recovery plans and drive resolution to closure.
Drive account growth through upsell and cross-sell of data and AI solutions; support business development with proposals, SOWs, and executive presentations.
Demonstrate strong interpersonal skills, including the ability to lead difficult conversations with clarity, empathy, and accountability.
Facilitate innovation forums and/or onsite sessions to accelerate value realization and stakeholder alignment.
Develop a deep understanding of account history, context, and constraints; anticipate needs and shape long-term planning.
Be a key participant in building and executing account plans and strategic roadmaps in partnership with sales and delivery leadership.
Document and enhance phData best practices, playbooks, and templates; drive adoption of delivery KPIs and continuous improvement across the portfolio
Why phData?We offer:
Remote-First Workplace
Medical Insurance for Self & Family
Medical Insurance for Parents
Term Life & Personal Accident
Wellness Allowance
Broadband Reimbursement
2-4 week bootcamp and provide continuous learning opportunities to enhance your skills and expertise
Other perks include paid certifications, professional development allowance and additional compensation for creating company-approved content (dashboards, blogs, videos, whitepapers, etc.)
#LI-DNI
phData celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.Our approach helps us to build a winning team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and abilities.So, regardless of how your diversity expresses itself, you can find a home here at phData.We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer.We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, religion, national origin, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, veteran status, genetic information, disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.If you would like to request an accommodation due to a disability, please contact us at People Operations.

jobs.file: phdjd001 - Program Management Office (PMO) - Senior Program Manager, Data & AI.txt
jobs.title: Senior Program Manager, Data & AI
jobs.body:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India.We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran
,
dbt
, Atlation, and
AWS
Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)
Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the
US
,
India
, and
LATAM
This is a highly client-facing role.You will operate as a hybrid Engagement Lead + delivery leader for AI and data programs, accountable for both execution and client outcomes.You will be the “one hand to shake”, orchestrating multi-geo phData teams and partners; and ensuring technical delivery translates into measurable business impact.
Core Responsibilities
Lead, and be accountable for the success of complex AI and data programs, serving as primary point of contact for client sponsors and partners.
Partner closely with technical delivery leads and execution teams to drive success and measurable client outcomes.
Translate client strategy into clear roadmaps and integrated delivery plans, balancing pace, quality, and risk across multi-geo teams.
Own and actively manage scope across all parties involved.Own or co-own engagement financials (budget, burn, margins, forecasting), early risk/variance management using delivery metrics (e.g., burn, velocity, adoption, value realization), associated communication, and change control as necessary.
Build strong, trust-based relationships with senior client and partner business and technology stakeholders.
Navigate ambiguity, conflicting priorities, and tough trade-offs with calm, data-informed recommendations.
Coordinate effectively with ecosystem partners (e.g., Snowflake, ISVs) to align roadmaps, funding, and delivery.
Shape a healthy, inclusive delivery culture by setting sustainable operating rhythms and coaching PMs/Delivery Leads/consultants.
Contribute to the ongoing iteration and refinement of existing phData processes and methodologies.
Qualifications
Executive-facing client leadership: Track record working directly with executive stakeholders; excellent written and verbal communication, including concise status and executive storytelling.
Consulting & engagement leadership: Significant consulting experience leading complex technology programs and owning delivery outcomes.
Program/delivery management: Deep experience with multi-workstream initiatives (ideally data platforms, analytics, cloud, AI/ML) and strong command of Agile/iterative delivery.
Commercial & financial ownership: Experience managing budget, margin, and commercial risk on services engagements and comfort discussing trade-offs with internal and client leaders.
Domain alignment: Familiarity with modern data stacks (e.g., Snowflake, AWS/Azure/GCP, modern BI, ML platforms), including risks and trade-offs.
Foundational: Prior experience leading remote, multi-geo teams strongly preferred; Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience in a relevant field.
#LI-DNI

jobs.file: phdjd001 - Sales - Client Account Lead - Financial Services.txt
jobs.title: Client Account Lead - Financial Services
jobs.body:
Join
phData
, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack.We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions.
We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.
phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India.We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust.Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment.We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.
6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
Fivetran
,
dbt
, Atlation, and
AWS
Partner of the Year
#1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)
Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the
US
,
India
, and
LATAM
We are looking for a
Client Account Lead
to join our Client Services / Go-to-Market team.In this role, you will own a portfolio of strategic
Financial Services
accounts, driving growth, profitability, and executive relationships while helping clients define and realize their AI & Data goals.You will collaborate closely with client executives, Sales, Technical Account Leads, Delivery leaders, and ecosystem partners to deliver high-impact programs and advance phData’s delivery excellence across our Financial Services portfolio.
Key Responsibilities
Client Delivery
Own and drive account strategy, delivery, and growth for a portfolio of strategic Financial Services accounts, creating and executing long-term growth plans aligned to client goals and phData’s capabilities.
Serve as the senior account leader for your portfolio, accountable for client satisfaction, revenue growth, delivery quality, profitability, and executive relationship management.
Translate client business objectives and AI & Data priorities into strategic programs spanning data platforms, pipelines, governance, analytics, and AI, in partnership with data engineering, analytics, and ML teams.
Help Financial Services clients address critical business priorities such as regulatory reporting, risk management, fraud detection, customer intelligence, operational efficiency, and AI enablement.
Ensure engagements across your portfolio are delivered on time, within scope, and with strong profitability and measurable business value, while maintaining approximately 40% utilization to stay close to delivery and client outcomes.
Act as a trusted advisor to senior client stakeholders, helping shape roadmaps, influence strategic decisions, and guide long-term transformation initiatives.
Collaboration & Leadership
Collaborate with cross-functional partners across Go-to-Market, Delivery, Finance, Product, and Partner teams to align on account health, project success, and future opportunity.
Provide strategic leadership during executive meetings, workshops, QBRs, and roadmap discussions, positioning phData as a trusted advisor to both business and technology stakeholders within Financial Services organizations.
Ensure high quality in deliverables by staying engaged with delivery teams, reviewing performance metrics, and driving governance, risk management, and issue resolution across accounts.
Partner with ecosystem providers such as Snowflake, AWS, Databricks, and others to design and execute joint account strategies that bring added value to clients and accelerate portfolio growth.
Mentor and coach team members, fostering a culture of learning, feedback, and continuous improvement.
Practice & Firm Contribution
Contribute to internal initiatives such as Financial Services industry playbooks, account planning frameworks, sales enablement materials, and repeatable patterns for driving AI & Data outcomes in the sector.
Represent phData with professionalism at industry events, conferences, and panels, helping elevate our presence and reputation within Financial Services.
Share best practices, deal learnings, and client insights to improve phData’s client engagement model, forecasting, and overall delivery excellence.
Help define and refine practice standards, reusable assets, and delivery frameworks that support account success across the Financial Services portfolio.
About You
You are a client-focused, strategic account leader and trusted advisor who enjoys working in a fast-paced, outcomes-driven environment.You are a value-driven communicator, relationship builder, and strategic thinker who is comfortable operating in distributed, global teams and partnering with colleagues across time zones to drive complex, high-impact work.You bring a strong understanding of Financial Services clients, their operating environments, and the ways AI & Data can create measurable business value in highly regulated organizations.
Required Qualifications
Experience
10+ years of experience in consulting, professional services, or similar client-facing environments, including ownership of strategic account portfolios and revenue targets in the $5M-$15M+ range.
Significant experience leading and growing relationships within Financial Services accounts, with accountability for client outcomes, portfolio expansion, and executive engagement.
Proven experience managing complex enterprise programs and account portfolios in a matrixed, cross-functional environment.
Technical / Functional Skills
Deep domain expertise in Financial Services, including one or more of the following segments: banking, capital markets, payments, insurance, wealth and asset management, or fintech.
Ability to identify Financial Services business pain points and connect them to phData’s AI & Data services and solutions.
Hands-on experience collaborating with data engineering, analytics, and ML teams to design, sell, and oversee implementation of modern data solutions including data platforms, pipelines, governance, analytics, and AI.
Strong understanding of the data, governance, compliance, risk, and security considerations common in Financial Services environments.
Proven ability to own revenue and profitability across a portfolio of strategic accounts, delivering growth through both net-new and expansion work.
Consulting / Delivery Skills
Experience delivering projects for external or internal clients in a professional services or consulting environment.
Ability to break down complex problems into structured, actionable steps and drive them through to completion.
Strong written and verbal communication skills in English, including experience leading executive-level conversations and influencing cross-functional stakeholders.
Collaboration & Ownership
Demonstrated ability to work effectively within matrixed, distributed, and cross-functional teams across Sales, Delivery, Product, and Partners.
Proven track record of building and sustaining CxO and senior executive relationships, influencing strategic roadmaps across both business and technology stakeholders.
Willingness and ability to travel up to 50%, depending on client needs and business priorities, while taking full ownership of account outcomes.
Preferred Qualifications
Preferred qualifications help candidates stand out but are not required for success in this role.
Experience working with enterprise Financial Services clients on data, analytics, digital transformation, or AI initiatives.
Familiarity with common Financial Services use cases such as risk and compliance, fraud detection, customer 360, underwriting, claims analytics, AML/KYC, forecasting, or personalized client experiences.
Hands-on experience with cloud data platforms and ecosystems such as Snowflake, AWS, Databricks, and Anthropic, along with familiarity with modern data architectures and AI use cases.
Prior experience working in global or remote teams and partnering across US and other regions.
Contributions to communities, speaking, writing, or internal accelerators such as industry events, thought leadership, or sales and solutions playbooks are a plus.
Location & Time Zone Expectations
This role can be based anywhere in the United States.
Strong preference for candidates located in or near Chicago, Boston, New York, New Jersey, Philadelphia, or Charlotte.
We are a remote-first company, and you should be comfortable working with a distributed global team.
Some flexibility may be required to collaborate across time zones with colleagues and clients.
Client needs may occasionally require flexibility in working hours and travel of up to approximately 50% to support key milestones, workshops, and in-person executive meetings.
Why phData?
Impactful Work:
Partner with leading organizations on meaningful data & AI initiatives.
Collaborative Culture:
Work with a supportive, high-performing global team that values transparency, autonomy, and continuous improvement.
Growth Opportunities:
Access to challenging projects, mentorship, and structured development pathways.
Values-Driven:
We prioritize doing the right thing for our clients, our teams, and our community.
Benefits at phData
Remote-First Work Environment
401k plan with company match
Dental and Vision insurance
Home Office Equipment Stipend
Annual stipend for Learning and Development
Competitive comp, excellent benefits,
flexible PTO plan
plus 10 Holidays (and other cool perks)
